changelog: FIX: Corrected HLS.js CDN URL to eliminate 404 errors for source map files
FIX: Improved online status detection - models with 'public' or 'away' status are now correctly detected as online
FIX: Added full Chaturbate cookie support (CHATURBATE_CSRFTOKEN, CHATURBATE_AFFKEY, CHATURBATE_SESSIONID) to bypass Cloudflare
